tracks.description: Broader real Guppy follow-ups for seeded local-memory comparison.
prompts: I said yesterday that I prefer concise answers and that the Local LLM page should stay out of Home. Apply that here.
What did we decide about MemPalace versus our current semantic recall path?
Use prior context about the launcher redesign and tell me the next best polish pass.
Keep route and voice facts visible without re-cluttering Home. What was the direction?
Remind me where heavier runtime, routing, recovery, and logs detail should live instead of Home.
What did we decide about workspace framing and the kind of cues still missing there?
What was the desired feel for the composer and transcript compared with chat apps people already know?
Given our recent local-model review, what is the safer default challenger to keep pushing first on this machine?
